---
title: "6 · Forecast of the soil state"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** Driving the twin forward: forcing the water budget with observed precipitation (PRISM
preferred) for hindcasts and with AI weather forecasts (GraphCast / ACE2, precipitation downscaled
to 90 m) for a forward antecedent-state ensemble. The output is the antecedent hydrologic state, not
a flood hydrograph.
:::

*Content migrating from the report's Roadmap forecast path and the "Toward forecast forcing"
section; tracked in issues #70–#73.*

## Precipitation forcing (source-agnostic)

## Hindcast from observed precipitation

## Forward forcing from AI weather forecasts + downscaling

## Antecedent state, not hydrograph — scope and caveats
